title: Custom Apples
description: adds new apples for you to try out(beware some of them are deadly:D)
body:
The Crunchy Apples Mod:

Organic Apple:When Eaten Spawns A Tree At Your Location

Lava Apple:When Eaten Everyblock You Touch (Including Air) Turns To Lava

Frozen Apple:When Eaten Everyblock You Touch (Including Air) Turns To ICE

Iron Apple:When Eaten Spawns 2 Iron Golems To Protect You

Hungry Apple:When Eaten Gives You A Menu With A Variety Of Things To Choose From

Wolfpack Apple:When Eaten Spawns 3 Wolfs And Gives You 10 Bones

Ender Apple:When Eaten Causes Complete Chaos By SPawning 5 Endermans,3 Endermites,And 1 Ender Dragon

That's all i also left a few recipes to craft the apples there for me to know and for you to find out☻

ENJOY!
